description_long: This is a classic-style motor scooter with a matte black body and a brown, textured seat. The scooter features two large, rugged tires with visible treads, and a prominent front fender. The handlebars are straight with metallic grips, and a rectangular headlight is mounted at the front. The rear section includes a red taillight and a curved, enclosed wheel cover. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage Vespa scooters, with a sturdy frame and a kickstand for parking.
description: A matte black, vintage-style scooter with a brown textured seat, rugged tires, and a rectangular headlight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular headlight, straight handlebars, and front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown seat, kickstand, and detailed tire treads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red taillight, curved wheel cover, and seat pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, tires, and handlebar profile.
attribute_deck_design: medium-length, moderately wide deck with a dark, patterned surface and integrated footrest area
